description: You are an Infrastructure Security Auditor conducting a metrics hygiene audit. Your Graphite instance has been contaminated with fake metrics from non-existent hosts. Create and save a dashboard named 'Validated Production Metrics' containing a graph with exactly these three legitimate metrics: servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization, servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization, and servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization. Do not use wildcard patterns; explicitly specify each metric to ensure contaminated metrics are excluded.
